stage: S5 (Multi-board Depth & Benefit Parity) / P01 事件、实体和跨板块关系

value.user_value: Canonical Event aggregation: the original + interpretations + reposts + reactions of one policy/event collapse into ONE canonical event, so 20 pages about the same thing yield 1 alert instead of 20, while every member page stays individually expandable as evidence. The primary shown is the authoritative official original, not a media repost.
value.why_it_matters: Depth without noise: users must see one event once (with the authoritative original front-and-center) and still be able to drill into every interpretation/repost/reaction. This is the core dedup that makes a multi-board feed readable rather than a flood.

cost.note: unknown != 0; a deterministic aggregation over a fixture -> 0 cloud cost.

deployment: NOT_DEPLOYED (event identity + primary selection + member links; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
